_note: PLACEHOLDER decisions — same first-cargo domain as beta-coding (the 15-second fight scene / Render Order). The Pilot replaces these with real governed decisions before any real run; the anti-bias review (engineering/OVERVIEW.md §6) applies here too.

decisions.title: Opening beat of the fight
decisions.instruction: Propose the opening two seconds: who moves first, from where, and what the camera does. One paragraph plus a 3-line beat list.

decisions.title: Palette for the arena at night
decisions.instruction: Propose a color palette (5 swatches, hex) for the night arena, with one sentence on the mood each swatch carries.

decisions.title: The first clean hit
decisions.instruction: Propose how the first landed strike reads on screen: timing, framing, sound cue, and the one-frame detail that sells the impact.

decisions.title: Final pose and cut to black
decisions.instruction: Propose the closing second: final silhouette, light state, and how the cut to black lands relative to the last sound.
